info.name: ONHS — Swaasa Catalog Publish
info.description:
### Quick-start: environment setup

1. Import **ONHS_Dev_Environment.json** into Postman (Environments → Import).
2. Select the **ONHS Dev** environment from the environment picker.
3. Set `cds_url` to the CDS sandbox endpoint (confirm with ONHS network team).
4. `network_id` is currently `onhs.in/health` — confirm with the ONHS registry team.

## ONHS — Swaasa Catalog Publish

> ⚠ **Prerequisite for all UC transaction flows.** The BPP must successfully publish its catalog to the CDS before any Seeker NP (BAP) can discover it via `discover` / `on_discover`. Run this collection once per catalog version before executing UC0, UC1, or UC2 collections.

**Flow:** BPP → CDS (`catalog/publish`) ← ACK · CDS → BPP (`catalog/on_publish`, async)
**Publisher:** Swaasa Health Platform (`provider-np-swaasa-001`)
**CDS endpoint:** `{{cds_url}}` — **confirm with ONHS network team before running**
**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + Health* schema pack v2.1

---

### Catalog summary

| Component | Value |
|---|---|
| Catalog ID | `catalog-swaasa-001` |
| Resource ID | `res-swaasa-cough-v2` |
| Service | Swaasa AI Cough Analysis (healthServiceType: DIAGNOSTIC_ANALYTICS) |
| Offers | 2 (see offer table below) |
| Model | Swaasa-CoughAI-v2.3.1 · CDSCO reg. MD-AI-2024-SWAASA-001 |

### Offer table

| Offer ID | Rate | Eligibility |
|---|---|---|
| `offer-swaasa-bulk-standard` | ₹250/unit | All registered implementing agencies |
| `offer-swaasa-bulk-ngo` (`{{offer_id}}`) | ₹200/unit | NGOs with valid district-level MOU |

`discountRef: NGO-DISCOUNT-20PCT-2026` is pre-published inside `cons-ngo-cat-001` on the NGO offer. BAP clients that select the NGO offer in UC0 receive this ref as a traceability label in their HealthEntitlement.

---

### Structural conventions (per core beckn.yaml v2.0.0)

- **No `schemaContext`** in either message. The `schemaContext` array is restricted to `discover` and `on_discover` (catalog phase of the transaction lifecycle). In catalog/publish, attribute-level `@context` fields on `resourceAttributes`, `offerAttributes`, and `considerationAttributes` carry JSON-LD type resolution directly.
- **No `bapId` / `bapUri`** — there is no Seeker NP in this management flow. `bppId` identifies the BPP publisher; `bppUri` is the BPP's callback endpoint for the async `on_publish` result.
- **`action` enum** — `"catalog/publish"` (slash form, per spec path). The CDS also accepts `"catalog_publish"` (underscore form) as an alternate.
- **ACK → async callback** — `/catalog/publish` returns HTTP 200 ACK immediately; the per-catalog processing result arrives at `{{bpp_uri}}/catalog/on_publish` asynchronously (no guaranteed delivery window — confirm with CDS operator).
- **No `considerations` at catalog root** — pricing lives exclusively in `offer.considerations[]`.

---

### on_publish result variants

The folder shows the **ACCEPTED** path. For error-path testing, replace `message.results[0].status` and add an `errors[]` array:

| status | When | errors[] |
|---|---|---|
| `ACCEPTED` | All items indexed successfully | absent |
| `REJECTED` | Catalog failed schema or domain validation | required — array of `Error` objects |
| `PARTIAL` | Some items accepted, some rejected | required — per-item `Error` objects |

---

### Variable dependencies — carry forward from UC0

These variables must match across the UC0 and all downstream UC collections:

| Variable | Default value | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `provider_np_id` | `provider-np-swaasa-001` | BPP NP ID |
| `catalog_id` | `catalog-swaasa-001` | Swaasa catalog |
| `resource_id` | `res-swaasa-cough-v2` | Cough analysis resource |
| `offer_id` | `offer-swaasa-bulk-ngo` | NGO-rate offer (₹200/unit) |
| `offer_id_standard` | `offer-swaasa-bulk-standard` | Standard offer (₹250/unit) |
| `discount_ref` | `NGO-DISCOUNT-20PCT-2026` | Pre-published in cons-ngo-cat-001 |
| `cds_url` | *(empty — set before running)* | CDS base URL — TBC with network team |

variable.description: CDS (Catalog Discovery Service) base URL — confirm with ONHS network team. Example: https://cds.onhs.in/beckn
BPP endpoint — Swaasa Health Platform. Used as on_publish async callback target.
BPP NP ID — Swaasa Health Platform. Must match UC0 and all UC collections.
ONHS network-issued JWT — set before running.
Swaasa catalog ID. Carry-forward from UC0.
Swaasa AI Cough Analysis resource ID. Carry-forward from UC0.
NGO-rate offer ID (₹200/unit). Carry-forward from UC0.
Standard-rate offer ID (₹250/unit). Present in published catalog; not selected by default in UC0.
Pre-published discount label in cons-ngo-cat-001. Carry-forward from UC0.
ONHS network identifier. Confirm exact value with ONHS registry team before going live.
UUID format required by core spec. Use the same value as in the paired UC collection, or a fresh UUID for standalone publish runs.

item.name: 01 — catalog/publish
item.description:
BPP → CDS. Swaasa Health Platform submits catalog-swaasa-001 for indexing.
Payload: 1 catalog · 1 resource (res-swaasa-cough-v2) · 2 offers.
CDS returns HTTP 200 ACK immediately; per-catalog result arrives asynchronously at bppUri/catalog/on_publish.
No schemaContext — restricted to discover/on_discover per core spec.

request.description:
POST to CDS. Expect HTTP 200 ACK on acceptance.
HTTP 409 AckNoCallback = CDS accepted but will not send on_publish callback.
HTTP 400/401/500 = rejected — check error object in response body.
action enum: 'catalog/publish' (slash form). CDS also accepts 'catalog_publish' (underscore).

item.name: 02 — catalog/on_publish  ★ Catalog Indexed

request.description:
CDS callback to BPP endpoint.
message.results[0].status = ACCEPTED — catalog successfully indexed.
stats: itemCount=1 (resource), providerCount=1, categoryCount=1.
After ACCEPTED: BAP discover calls will return this catalog via CDS.
